General.Name: NFL Biosciences SAS
General.Description: NFL Biosciences SA, a biotechnology company, engages in the development of botanical drugs in France. The company's pipeline includes NFL-101, a drug candidate for smoking cessation, currently under Phase 2b clinical trials; and NFL-301, a drug candidate for reducing alcohol consumption which is in preclinical stage. It has scientific collaboration with McLean Hospital to deepen the understanding of the mechanism of action of NFL-101, its proprietary botanical drug candidate for smoking cessation. NFL Biosciences SA was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Castelnau-le-Lez, France.
